title: dubrueilia ciliaris
intro: Dubrueilia ciliaris, also known as Lesser Periwinkle or Vinca minor, is a low-maintenance, flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including alkaloids like vincristine and vinblastine, which have been used to treat various types of cancer. The health benefits of Dubrueilia ciliaris include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and have antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as extracts and tinctures, are often used to treat various ailments, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
